features: Essential Item - Brought to you by Glamour Studio, these 3 Spotty Printed Shower Caps are a vital accessory in any bathroom. They are fantastic for keeping your hair dry whilst you take a shower.
Waterproof - Protect your ‘do from getting wet with these amazing plastic bathing caps. The water just bounces right off, so you can have a wash without messing up your tresses.

Funky Design - Shower in style with this colourful 3 pack! It contains one pink and one blue cap, each with a delightful dotted pattern. Built for comfort, this set of elasticated Spotty Printed Shower Caps can stretch to fit any sized head!
Affordable - Furthermore, these reusable Spotty Printed Shower Caps are excellent value for money. The durable material means they can be worn time and time again!
Glam Grooming - From headbands to pedicure sets, Glamour Studio stocks everything you could possibly need for self care. Come take a look at our massive range of basic beauty products!
description: Product Description Lots of Ranges, Lots of products Eco Plush Soft Toys Our eco plush soft toys are cuddly, lovable, and kind to the planet. Made from 100% recycled plastic, each toy gives new life to materials that would otherwise go to waste. Soft to the touch and safe for all ages, these plush friends combine sustainability with comfort, making them a thoughtful choice for eco-conscious families. It’s feel-good fun you can truly snuggle up to. Outdoor Games Our outdoor toys are all about adventure, energy, and imagination. Make every Garden, park, or driveway a playground full of laughter and fun. Grab one of our water pistols too cool off on hot summer days. Drink Containers We offer a variety of drink containers that are practical, durable, and perfect for everyday use. Whether you're at home, on the go, or enjoying the outdoors, our containers make it easy to stay hydrated. With different sizes, styles, and colours to choose from, there's an option for everyone. Paddling Pools Summer Cool Off Our paddling pools and inflatables are perfect for cooling off and having fun during warm days. Easy to set up and safe for all ages, they provide a refreshing way to enjoy the outdoors right in your backyard. Whether you’re splashing around in a paddling pool or bouncing on a colorful inflatable, these products bring joy and excitement to family time and summer play. Lots Of Product the Outdoor Adventures Camping Gear Our camping gear is designed to help you enjoy the great outdoors with comfort and ease. From durable tents and cozy sleeping bags to essential tools and accessories, we have everything you need for a fun and hassle-free adventure. Whether you're heading out for a weekend getaway or a longer trek, our reliable gear makes it easy to relax, explore, and make lasting memories in nature. Seasonal Items Decorations and Party Props Our seasonal products bring festive cheer to every time of year, including popular holidays like Christmas and Halloween. From spooky decorations and costume props for Halloween to twinkling lights and ornaments for Christmas, we offer a variety of items to help you celebrate in style. Whether you’re hosting a holiday party, decorating your home, or looking for the perfect seasonal gift, our products make it easy to embrace the spirit and joy of each season. Huge Range Dog And Pets Our pet supplies are made to keep your furry friends happy, healthy, and well cared for. From cozy beds and fun toys to grooming essentials. Pop Storage Our pop-up storage products are a quick and convenient way to keep your space tidy without taking up extra room. Lightweight, collapsible, and easy to use, they’re perfect for storing toys, laundry, or everyday essentials. When not in use, they fold flat for easy storage, making them ideal for small spaces, busy homes, or on-the-go organization. BBQ Our BBQ products are perfect for grilling enthusiasts of all levels, offering everything you need to create delicious outdoor meals. From backyard gatherings to weekend camping trips, our BBQ gear brings people together around the joy of great food and outdoor fun. Fans Our fan products are designed to help you stay cool and comfortable, no matter the temperature. From compact personal fans to powerful room fans, we offer a variety of styles to suit any space and need. Easy to use and energy-efficient, our fans provide refreshing airflow that keeps you feeling fresh during hot days, whether at home, in the office
